questions.title: 1. Hello, World!
questions.description: Write a program that outputs exactly "Hello, World!" to the console.
questions.instructions: Your code should print "Hello, World!" followed by a new line. Output must match case exactly.

sampleTests.explanation: No inputs required. Simply print the greeting.

boilerplates.python:
# Write your code here
print("Hello, World!")

questions.title: 2. Sum of Two Integers
questions.description: Write a program that reads two space-separated integers A and B from standard input and prints their sum.
questions.instructions: Input consists of two integers A and B. Output a single integer representing A + B.

questions.title: 3. Even or Odd
questions.description: Read a single integer N from standard input. Output exactly "Even" if N is divisible by 2, and "Odd" otherwise.
questions.instructions: Input is a single integer N. Output must be exactly case-sensitive "Even" or "Odd".

sampleTests.explanation: 4 is divisible by 2, so it is Even.
7 is not divisible by 2, so it is Odd.
